name: Splash
description: Aesthetic note-taking with Google sign-in cloud sync.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; connect-src https://*.googleapis.com https://*.firebaseio.com https://*.cloudfunctions.net https://firestore.googleapis.com https://identitytoolkit.googleapis.com https://securetoken.googleapis.com https://api.elevenlabs.io
